backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing workout tracking with user profiles and workout sessions (including day-of-week field), featuring role-based access control and functions for adding workouts, querying history, and filtering by day or date range.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old workout sessions (without day field) to new format by adding a default 'monday' day-of-week field to all existing workout records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: workout entry form with day-of-week selector (REQ-8) and workout history view grouped by day (REQ-9).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components for workout entry with day selector, history list grouped by weekday, progression charts, and authentication flow.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system featuring orange/amber accent colors for light and dark modes, plus base styles for the fitness app theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Workout Tracker application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with three routes (history, add workout, progression), theme provider, profile setup modal, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ExerciseSelector: Dropdown select component for choosing an exercise from a list of unique exercise names, used for filtering progression charts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with fitness-themed hero header, sticky navigation menu (History, Add Workout, Progression) for authenticated users, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states, clearing query cache on logout, and error recovery for duplicate authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, using Internet Identity authentication and profile management hooks.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: Displays workout progression charts (volume, weight, reps, sets) for a specific exercise using Recharts with tabbed views and custom tooltips.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutEntryForm: Form component for logging workout sessions with fields for day, exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes, with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutHistoryLi: Displays workout history grouped by day of the week with detailed session information including volume calculations and formatted dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddWorkout.ts: Mutation hook for adding workout sessions to the backend, invalidating workout history queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating queries are organized in separate hook files.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook for saving the current user's profile, invalidating the profile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWorkoutHistory.ts: Query hook that fetches and sorts the authenticated user's workout history in reverse chronological order.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, typography styles for headings, and base styling for body and borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AddWorkoutPage.tsx: Page component for adding workouts that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users or renders WorkoutEntryForm for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressionPage.tsx: Page component displaying workout progression analytics with exercise selection and charts, requiring authentication and showing appropriate empty/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutHistoryPage.ts: Page component that displays workout history list for authenticated users or shows a login prompt for unauthenticated visitors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom theme with OKLCH color system, container settings, font families, border radius variables, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (workout entry form, history view, progression visualization, day-of-week organization) and pending feature requests for workout data loading and tracking.
